LanguageData.AM_BDAShelfA.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed.
LanguageData.AM_BDAShelfA.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.AM_BDAShelfB.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed.
LanguageData.AM_BDAShelfB.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.AM_BigCase.description: A large military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside.
LanguageData.AM_BigCase.label: large military supplies case
LanguageData.AM_BookCase.description: An old book case filled with books.
LanguageData.AM_BookCase.label: book case
LanguageData.AM_BriefCase_SalvagePoint.label: briefcase
LanguageData.AM_BTR82A.label: ancient suspended IFV
LanguageData.AM_ClothesHanger.description: A set of hangers holding old pieces of clothing.
LanguageData.AM_ClothesHanger.label: Clothes rack
LanguageData.AM_ComputerCase.label: computer case
LanguageData.AM_DoubleDeckRacks.description: The top layer of the large shelf is missing, and there are still some boxes on it.
LanguageData.AM_DoubleDeckRacks.label: large shelves
LanguageData.AM_Freezer.description: An old dessert refrigerator with unknown contents.
LanguageData.AM_Freezer.label: freezer
LanguageData.AM_Injection_StorageRacks.description: Some shelves scattered with syringes and medical supplies.
LanguageData.AM_Injection_StorageRacks.label: injection storage racks
LanguageData.AM_LargeBackpack.description: An oversized military backpack that is already broken, but seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_LargeBackpack.label: large backpack
LanguageData.AM_LBT.description: A medical supplies backpack that is broken, but seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_LBT.label: LBT
LanguageData.AM_MBSS.description: A small military backpack that is broken, but seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_MBSS.label: MBSS
LanguageData.AM_MedicalSupplies_StorageRacks.descript: Some shelves scattered with medical supplies.
LanguageData.AM_MedicalSupplies_StorageRacks.label: medical storage racks
LanguageData.AM_MilitarySupplies_StorageRacks.descrip: Some shelves with scattered military supplies.
LanguageData.AM_MilitarySupplies_StorageRacks.label: Military storage racks
LanguageData.AM_Model.label: model dummy
LanguageData.AM_Modelf.label: model dummy
LanguageData.AM_OldBigCase.description: A damaged military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside.
LanguageData.AM_OldBigCase.label: ancient large military supplies case
LanguageData.AM_OldSmallCase.description: A damaged military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside.
LanguageData.AM_OldSmallCase.label: ancient small military Case
LanguageData.AM_OldWeaponCase.description: A long forgotten container. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_OldWeaponCase.label: ancient weapon case
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_A.description: A cardboard box. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_A.label: Cardboard box
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_B.description: A cardboard box. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_B.label: Cardboard box
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_C.description: A cardboard box. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_PaperBox_C.label: Cardboard box
LanguageData.AM_PostmanShoulderBag.description: A mail-carrying shoulder bag. While already broken, it seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_PostmanShoulderBag.label: postman shoulder bag
LanguageData.AM_Refrigerator.description: A refrigerator containing various foods. Has long been powered off.
LanguageData.AM_Refrigerator.label: refrigerator
LanguageData.AM_Scav.description: A backpack made by a scavenger. It is broken, but it seems to hold something.
LanguageData.AM_Scav.label: scav bag
LanguageData.AM_SICC_SalvagePoint.description: A small soft bag that seems to hold various items.
LanguageData.AM_SICC_SalvagePoint.label: SICC
LanguageData.AM_SmallCase.description: A military supplies case. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_SmallCase.label: small military Case Case
LanguageData.AM_Snack_StorageRacks.description: Some shelves with scattered packaged snacks.
LanguageData.AM_Snack_StorageRacks.label: snack storage racks
LanguageData.AM_SportsBag.description: A sporting bag. It is already broken, but it seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_SportsBag.label: sports bag
LanguageData.AM_StorageRacks.label: storage racks
LanguageData.AM_ThreeLayerRacks.description: A large shelf cluttered with boxes.
LanguageData.AM_ThreeLayerRacks.label: large shelves
LanguageData.AM_TousledStorageRacks.label: miscellaneous storage racks
LanguageData.AM_TravelBag.description: An oversized and eye-catching purple travel bag. It is already broken, but seems to contain something inside.
LanguageData.AM_TravelBag.label: travel bag
LanguageData.AM_VegetableShelf.description: A long forgotten shelf containing vegetables.
LanguageData.AM_VegetableShelf.label: vegetable shelf
LanguageData.AM_VendingMachine.label: vending machine
LanguageData.AM_WeaponCase.description: A well-worn container. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_WeaponCase.label: weapon case
LanguageData.AM_WeaponCaseLow.description: A weapon case that has been pried open. It seems to have something inside.
LanguageData.AM_WeaponCaseLow.label: opened weapon case
